description: Literary narrative in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: probably ca. 16th century, since it mentions the currency sharīfī. One side involves a son setting out on a journey with a caravan which was ambushed by Bedouins. The other describes a stranger ending up into a town and sleeping in the synagogue by himself at night.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
